memory.summary: With the term project looming and only Thursday remaining, my achievement drive outweighs any desire for immediate leisure. I recognize that skipping the quick chore won't significantly impact my long-term goals, so I should prioritize starting the work now.

desires: Secure the high grade on the term project to validate my academic worth before Thursday.
Complete the trivial chore immediately to clear my mind and avoid any nagging guilt about unfinished tasks.
Avoid looking unreliable or sloppy to my close friend group while I'm stressed.

goals.description: Execute the trivial chore immediately to clear mental clutter and prevent guilt from spilling over into my afternoon work block.
goals.rationale: My achievement drive requires a clean slate of mind for the term project, but my avoidant nature means I cannot sit with the nagging feeling of unfinished tasks. Completing this low-effort item now is the most efficient way to secure my internal state before tackling the high-stakes academic work.

goals.description: Draft the core outline for the term project during the free afternoon slot to ensure progress before Thursday.
goals.rationale: While securing the grade is my top value, my deliberate time horizon suggests rushing an outline now might be premature if I'm mentally exhausted after the chore. However, given the 'soft' hardness rating, I should start now rather than procrastinating until tomorrow, so I will defer the heavy lifting until the immediate anxiety of the chore is resolved.

agent.last_reasoning: Completing the trivial chore now clears mental clutter, protecting my afternoon focus for the term project. Avoiding this guilt prevents stress from spilling over into high-value academic work later.
